h1.visual_description: Centered, Bold, Large Font (approx 16-18pt), Title Case, often preceded and followed by horizontal rules on the first page.
h1.example_text: Modeling Microenvironment Trajectories on Spatial Transcriptomics with NicheFlow

h2.visual_description: Left-aligned, Bold, Large Font (approx 12-14pt), Arabic numeral prefix (e.g., 1, 2, 3).

h3.visual_description: Left-aligned, Bold, Standard Font Size, Multi-level Arabic numeral prefix (e.g., 3.1, 4.2).

h4.visual_description: Left-aligned, Bold, Standard Font Size, Triple-level Arabic numeral prefix (e.g., 5.1.1).

h5.visual_description: In-line, Bold, followed by a period and then body text.

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered block with 'Abstract' label in bold
Numbered equations centered with right-aligned parentheses
Table X: prefix in bold followed by descriptive text above a grid
Figure X: prefix in bold followed by descriptive text below an image
Italicized text block following a question mark
Bulleted list with bold leading phrases

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX style using double dollar signs for display blocks and single dollar signs for inline notation. Use \begin{equation} for numbered blocks.
markdown_grammar.table_style: Standard Markdown pipes with bold headers; complex multi-column tables should be represented as HTML tables to preserve alignment.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numerical indices in square brackets, e.g., [1, 2-5]. References section uses full bibliographic entries starting with [Number].

layout_info.header_footer_pattern: First page contains conference footer (e.g., NeurIPS 2025); subsequent pages contain centered page numbers at the bottom.

registry.new_rule: Algorithm blocks are delimited by horizontal rules, with 'Algorithm X' in bold followed by the title. Inputs and Outputs are listed before numbered steps. Comments are preceded by a triangle symbol (▷).

patches_applied.new_rule: Algorithm blocks are delimited by horizontal rules, with 'Algorithm X' in bold followed by the title. Inputs and Outputs are listed before numbered steps. Comments are preceded by a triangle symbol (▷).
